# Method Comparison Fixture

## Manual deck production

- Strength: direct control over every object.
- Weakness: slow iteration and inconsistent formatting.
- Risk: dense pages often become screenshots of text.

## Markdown-first production

- Strength: source can be reviewed in Git and regenerated.
- Weakness: semantic rules must be strong enough for real talk structure.
- Risk: automatic image or icon insertion can feel arbitrary if not grounded.

## Practical conclusion

The comparison should stay balanced. Each side has multiple details, and the layout needs enough room for two columns rather than forcing every point into a single vertical list.
